zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel Fychan ap Hywel於大約1314年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾帕可萊迪斯時，他的父親Hywel Sais ap Einion43歲，母親Lettice verch Cadwaldar30歲。他和Alys verch Llewelyn至少有10個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1355年在威爾士蒙姆爾享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel Fychan ap Hywel于大约1314年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾帕可萊迪斯时，他的父亲Hywel Sais ap Einion43岁，母亲Lettice verch Cadwaldar30岁。他和Alys verch Llewelyn至少有10个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1355年在威尔士蒙姆爾享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel Fychan ap Hywel was born about 1314, in Parcletis, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Hywel Sais ap Einion, was 43 and his mother, Lettice verch Cadwaldar, was 30. He had at least 10 sons and 3 daughters with Alys verch Llewelyn. He died in 1355, in Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel Fychan ap Hywel est né environ 1314, à Parcletis, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Hywel Sais ap Einion, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lettice verch Cadwaldar, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 10 fils et 3 filles avec Alys verch Llewelyn. Il est décédé en 1355, à Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel Fychan ap Hywel um 1314 in Parcletis, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel Sais ap Einion 43 und seine Mutter Lettice verch Cadwaldar 30. Er hatte mit Alys verch Llewelyn mindestens 10 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1355 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Monmouthshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel Fychan ap Hywel è nato il circa 1314 nel Parcletis, Monmouthshire, Galles, il suo padre, Hywel Sais ap Einion, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Lettice verch Cadwaldar, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 10 figli e 3 figlie con Alys verch Llewelyn. Morì nel 1355, nel Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel Fychan ap Hywelが約1314年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアパークレティスで生まれた時，父Hywel Sais ap Einionは43歳，母Lettice verch Cadwaldarは30歳であった。彼はAlys verch Llewelynとの間に少なくとも10人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1355年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel Fychan ap Hywel(이)가 대략 1314년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 파르클티스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel Sais ap Einion(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Lettice verch Cadwaldar(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Alys verch Llewelyn(와)과 적어도 열 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel Fychan ap Hywel nasceu aproximadamente 1314, em Parcletis, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Hywel Sais ap Einion, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Lettice verch Cadwaldar, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 10 filhos e 3 filhas com Alys verch Llewelyn. Ele faleceu em 1355, em Monmouthshire, Gales, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel Fychan ap Hywel родился около 1314 г. в местности парклетис, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Hywel Sais ap Einion было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lettice verch Cadwaldar, 30. У него было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 3 дочери от Alys verch Llewelyn. Он умер в 1355 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel Fychan ap Hywel nació aproximadamente 1314, en Parcletis, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Hywel Sais ap Einion, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Lettice verch Cadwaldar, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 10 hijos y 3 hijas con Alys verch Llewelyn. Murió en 1355, en Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 42 años.
